pi_items.source: Verified via task instructions and export_result.sh, which explicitly checks this path.
Verified via setup_task.sh which programmatically generates the building shell into this target filename from SweetHome3DExample7.sh3d.

privileged_info_summary: I verified that the task uses a programmatically generated SweetHome3D building shell, which originates from the sample SweetHome3DExample7.sh3d but has had all furniture stripped. I confirmed that the expected output path for the 3D photo rendering is exactly /home/ga/Desktop/jazz_club_render.png, and the expected start file is jazz_club_project.sh3d, which align perfectly with both the prompt instructions and the evaluation scripts.
